overall.description: A first-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront city, beginning on the water and progressing through promenades, urban streets, and staircases. The footage features flying vehicles, neon-lit commercial buildings, and a mix of architectural styles typical of Cyberpunk 2077. The scene transitions from open water views to dense urban corridors and back to recreational waterfront spaces.

events.description: camera moves from open water onto concrete pier structure, transitioning to solid ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the city waterfront by water, moving toward a concrete pier structure

entered.detail: calm water surface reflecting the sky, occupying most of the view
distant futuristic cityscape with tall buildings on the horizon
large industrial building with cranes visible across the water
concrete waterfront structure with vertical walls approaching from the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a calm body of water approaching a futuristic city. The camera moves steadily toward a concrete pier structure on the right, with a distant industrial building and city skyline visible across the water under a clear blue sky.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left
exits covered walkway and descends to open street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with water visible to the left and commercial buildings to the right, passing yellow benches

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with metal railings along the water
silver metal safety railing separating walkway from water
bright yellow and green painted benches lining the walkway
tall palm trees planted along the building edge
modern glass and concrete commercial structure with red accents

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a covered waterfront promenade with the water now visible to the left behind a metal railing. Yellow benches and palm trees line the right side against a modern commercial building. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the scene transitions toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with crosswalks and tall towers

events.description: flying car passes low overhead from left to right
crossing the street at a marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking down a city street toward a tall glass skyscraper, crossing at a crosswalk while pedestrians walk in the area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near the commercial building

entered.detail: asphalt road with marked lanes and crosswalks
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to street level with asphalt roads and crosswalks. The camera walks toward a prominent glass skyscraper while flying cars pass overhead. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking along the sidewalks, and palm trees continue to line the street.

events.description: enters shadowed area under building overhang with purple neon lighting visible

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide concrete staircase flanked by walls with digital advertisements, passing other pedestrians going up and down

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
large illuminated advertisement on the building wall
glowing purple neon signage visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase between commercial buildings. Digital billboards and neon signs become visible as the camera climbs, transitioning from bright sunlight to a more shadowed, artificially lit environment under a building overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with neon-lit food stall

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered upper walkway with neon lighting
turns back toward waterfront, water becomes visible again in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated commercial walkway, passing a neon-lit ramen shop and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in bright clothing walking past the ramen shop

entered.detail: food stall with purple neon lighting and Japanese lanterns
vibrant purple LED lighting illuminating the shop front
covered pedestrian walkway at upper level
distant view of the water visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the camera enters an elevated walkway featuring a ramen shop with distinctive purple neon lighting and Japanese lanterns. The camera continues along the walkway, turning back toward the waterfront where the water becomes visible again in the distance between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with basketball court below

events.description: flying vehicle passes by in the distance over the water
slows to observe basketball game in progress below

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront overlook, pausing to watch people playing basketball on the court below

notable_agents.action: group of people playing basketball on the court below

entered.detail: outdoor basketball court with white painted lines at lower level near water
people actively playing basketball on the court

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an open waterfront overlook with a basketball court visible at a lower level near the water. The camera walks along the railing, observing people playing basketball below while palm trees sway in the breeze. The scene ends with a clear view of the water and distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene waterfront approach into a dense, neon-lit urban center before returning to an elevated coastal overlook. It begins on a calm body of water moving toward a concrete pier under a clear blue sky, before transitioning onto a covered promenade lined with palm trees and yellow benches. As the camera reaches street level, the environment shifts toward a bustling cityscape of asphalt roads and glass skyscrapers with flying vehicles passing overhead. The scene then ascends a wide concrete staircase, moving from bright sunlight into the shadowed glow of digital billboards and a purple-lit ramen shop on an elevated walkway. Finally, the camera turns back toward the coast, emerging onto a waterfront overlook where people play basketball below against the backdrop of the distant city skyline.
